data.title: Worktrees accumulate without cleanup after debug-everything and sprint sessions
data.description: When running /dso:debug-everything and /dso:sprint, sub-agent worktrees are created via isolation: worktree but are not being properly cleaned up after sessions complete. Worktrees accumulate on disk, wasting space and potentially causing confusion with stale branches. The auto-cleanup logic in _offer_worktree_cleanup should remove worktrees that are (1) merged into main and (2) have a clean git status, but this is not consistently happening for the worktrees spawned by these skills.
